text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
...All right, just about the same as before. My lap
times are becoming more consistent.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Looks like my theory was correct... Okay, one
more lap!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Hey, I changed my mind. Let's do some extra
training.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Give me something that'll exhaust me to my
bones. Otherwise...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: The fire in my chest just won't go out!
choice_data_list: We can put it out tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I continue to add on extra training until Narita
Brian is satisfied.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: No. It has to be now, or there's no point.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her it's more efficient to train after a rest
than to train while her body is already tired.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Efficient? You sound like my sister.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Tch, fine. But that means I want something extra
challenging tomorrow.
